duas.title: Ziyarat Warith - Imam Husain (as)
duas.description: This Ziyarat Warith (Imam as the inheritor from all previous prophets) is recited on Thursday nights and even every day. It is also a means to seek needs when recited with specific intentions

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ آدَمَ صَفْوَةِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha adama safwati allahi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Adam the choice of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ نُوحٍ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha nuhin nabiyyi allahi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Noah the prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ خَلِيلِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha ibrahima khalili allahi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Abraham the intimate friend of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُوسَىٰ كَلِيمِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha musa kalimi allahi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Moses the spoken by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ عِيسَىٰ رُوحِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Jesus the spirit of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ مُحَمَّدٍ حَبِيبِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waritha muhammadin habibi allahi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of Muhammad the most beloved by Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَارِثَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O inheritor of the Commander of the Faithful, peace be upon him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ٱلْمُصْطَفَىٰ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Muhammad the well-chosen Prophet.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ عَلِيٍّ ٱلْمُرْتَضَىٰ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of `Ali the well-pleased.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ فَاطِمَةَ ٱلزَّهْرَاءِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Fatimah the luminous lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ خَدِيـجَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of Khadijah the grand lady.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا ثَارَ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ ثَارِهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya thara allahi wabna tharihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O vengeance of Allah, son of His vengeance,
and the unavenged so far.
I bear witness that you performed the prayers,
defrayed the poor-rate,
enjoined the right,
forbade the wrong,

segments.arabic: وَأَطَعْتَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُ حَتَّىٰ أَتَاكَ ٱلْيَقِينُ
segments.transliteration: wa ata`ta allaha wa rasulahu hatta ataka alyaqinu
segments.translation: and obeyed Allah and His Messenger until death came upon you.
So, may Allah curse the people who slew you.
May Allah curse the people who persecuted you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضِيَتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan sami`at bidhalika faradiyat bihi
segments.translation: May Allah curse the people who were pleased when they had heard of that.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: O my Master, O Abu-`Abdullah!

segments.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنَّكَ كُنْتَ نُوراً فِي ٱلأَصْلاَبِ ٱلشَّامِخَةِ
segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka kunta nuran fi al-aslabi alshshamikhati
segments.translation: I bear witness that you were light in the sublime loins
and purified wombs;
the impurities of the Ignorance Era could not object you to filth

segments.transliteration: wa lam tulbiska min mudlahimmati thiyabiha
segments.translation: nor could it dress you its murky clothes.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka min da`a'imi alddini
segments.translation: I also bear witness that you are one of the mainstays of the religion
and the supports of the faithful believers.

segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu annaka al-imamu albarru alttaqiyyu
segments.translation: I also bear witness that you are the God-fearing, pious,
pleased, immaculate,
guide, and well-guided Imam.

segments.arabic: وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ ٱلأَئِمَّةَ مِنْ وُلْدِكَ كَلِمَةُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ashhadu anna al-a'immata min wuldika kalimatu alttaqwa
segments.translation: And (I bear witness) that the Imams from your progeny are the spokesmen of piety,
the signs of guidance,
the firmest handle (of Islam),
and the decisive Argument against the inhabitants of the world.
And I call Allah, His angels,
His Prophets, and His Messenger
to witness for me that I believe in you all and in your Return,
I have full confidence in the laws of my religion and in the seals of my deeds,
my heart is at peace with you all,
and all my affairs are based on your commands.
May Allah’s benedictions be on your souls,
your bodies, your forms,
the present and the absent from you,
and the apparent and the invisible from you.

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi yabna rasuli allahi
segments.translation: My father and mother be sacrificed for you, O son of the Messenger of Allah!

segments.arabic: بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.transliteration: bi'abi anta wa ummi ya aba `abdillahi
segments.translation: My father and mother be sacrificed for you, O Abu `Abdullah!
Extremely terrible was the calamity
and astounding is the misfortune that you suffered upon us
and upon all the inhabitants of the heavens and the earth.

segments.transliteration: fala`ana allahu ummatan asrajat wa aljamat
segments.translation: Therefore, Allah may curse the people who saddled up, gave rein to their horses,
and prepared themselves to kill you.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: O my Master, O Abu `Abdullah!
I moved towards your sanctuary
and came to your shrine

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُ ٱللَّهَ بِٱلشَّأْنِ ٱلَّذِي لَكَ عِنْدَهُ
segments.translation: beseeching Allah in the name of the standing that you enjoy with Him
and the position that you occupy with Him

segments.arabic: أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an yusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: to send blessings on Muhammad and on the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَجْعَلَنِي مَعَكُمْ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa an yaj`alani ma`akum fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: and to keep me with you in this world and in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ نَبِيِّ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Prophet of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the commander of the faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ ٱلشَّهِيدِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of al-Husayn the martyr.
Peace be upon you, O martyr.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمَظْلُومُ وَٱبْنُ ٱلْمَظْلُومِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O wronged and harassed and the son of the wrong and harassed.
Curse of Allah be on those who killed you.
Curse of Allah be on those who persecuted you.

segments.arabic: وَلَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ أُمَّةً سَمِعَتْ بِذٰلِكَ فَرَضَيِتْ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la`ana allahu ummatan sami`at bidhalika faradiyat bihi
segments.translation: Curse of Allah be on those who heard this even but rested satisfied.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا وَلِيَّ ٱللَّهِ وَٱبْنَ وَلِيِّهِ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alayka ya waliyya allahi wabna waliyyihi
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O intimate servant of Allah and the son of His intimate servant.
Extremely terrible was the calamity
and astounding is the misfortune that you suffered, upon us
and upon all Muslims.
So, curse of Allah be on those who killed you

segments.transliteration: wa abra'u ila allahi wa ilayka minhum
segments.translation: and I disavow them in the presence of Allah and You.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَوْلِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَحِبَّائَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ya awliya'a allahi wa ahibba'ahu
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O friends and dears of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَصْفِيَاءَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَوِدَّاءَهُ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ya asfiya'a allahi wa awidda'ahu
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O choice of Allah and sincerely attached to Him.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ دِينِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Allah’s religion.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of the Messenger of Allah.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of the Commander of the Faithful.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ فَاطِمَةَ سَيِّدَةِ نِسَاءِ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `alaykum ya ansara fatimata sayyidati nisa'i al`alamina
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Fatimah the doyenne of the women of this world.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Abu Muhammad,
al-Hasan the son of `Ali, the saintly and sincere.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكُمْ يَا أَنْصَارَ أَبِي عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
segments.translation: Peace be upon all of you, O supporters of Abu-`Abdullah.
My father and mother be sacrificed for you.

segments.arabic: طِبْتُمْ وَطَابَتِ ٱلأَرْضُ ٱلَّتِي فِيهَا دُفِنْتُمْ
segments.transliteration: tibtum wa tabat al-ardu allati fiha dufintum
segments.translation: Verily, pure be you and pure be the soil in which you were buried.
You attained great success.

segments.arabic: فَيَا لَيْتَنِي كُنْتُ مَعَكُمْ فَأَفُوزَ مَعَكُمْ
segments.translation: Would that I were with you so that I could also share the accomplishment with you.

segments.arabic: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا بْنَ امِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: Peace be upon you, O son of the Commander of the Faithful.
Peace be upon you, O righteous servant (of Allah)
and obedient to Allah and to His Messenger.

segments.transliteration: ashhadu annaka qad jahadta wa nasahta
segments.translation: I bear witness that you strove (in the way of Allah), acted sincerely,
and tolerated (harm) until death came upon you.

segments.arabic: لَعَنَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ لَكُمْ مِنَ ٱلاوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: la`ana allahu alzzalimina lakum min al-awwalina wal-akhirina
segments.translation: May Allah curse those who wronged you from the past and the present generations
and may He send them to the lowest layer of the blazing Hell.
